result.stdout:
dotnet linq2db - Linq To DB command-line utilities. Version: 6.2.1.0

Usage:
        dotnet linq2db [help]: print this help
        dotnet linq2db help <command>: print help on specific command
        dotnet linq2db <command> [<options>]: execute specific command

linq2db tool provides database model scaffolding (reverse engineering) of database into Linq To DB (https://linq2db.github.io/) database model classes.

Supported commands:
        dotnet linq2db scaffold <options> : generate database data model classes from database schema
        dotnet linq2db template [-o output_template_file_path] : creates empty T4 template for scaffolding customization

Examples:
        dotnet linq2db scaffold -o c:\my_project\model -p SqlServer -c "Server=MySqlServer;Database=MyDatabase;User Id=scaffold_user;Password=secret;"
            generate data model code for SQL Server database in c:\my_project\model folder

        dotnet linq2db scaffold -i path\to\my_scaffold_options.json
            generate data model code using options from JSON file

        dotnet linq2db template
            create base T4 template for scaffolding customization in current folder
